Documents whose entities are named only by relational notation and whose internal logic is solid enough to be reasoned about. Requires high-quality generators, so deferred.

T4-logic is the reasoning form of technical documents: mazes, puzzles, riddles, and specifications expressed through abstract notation (A relates to B; when B and C are active, D is active) with internally solid logic. It supports the reasoning goal and needs strong generators, so it is deferred.
